title: Goiter symptom review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports clinician assessment of palpable thyroid enlargement or focal nodularity, recommendation-qualified ultrasound, compression symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.
examination.rationale: The exact thyroid-enlargement section supports measured vital signs, focused endocrine examination, laboratory and previous correspondence review, clinician plan, discussed safety net and arranged follow-up when documented; it does not order imaging or referral.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports clinician assessment of palpable thyroid enlargement or focal nodularity, recommendation-qualified ultrasound, compression symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.9.8 — thyroid enlargement with normal thyroid function

medication.text: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.
medication.rationale: The exact NICE information and warning-symptom section supports onset, change, functional impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives, patient concerns and clinician concern for thyroid enlargement without inferring cause.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.1.6 — information and thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms

additions.text: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.
additions.rationale: The exact NICE information and warning-symptom section supports onset, change, functional impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives, patient concerns and clinician concern for thyroid enlargement without inferring cause.
additions.evidence_extract: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.

source_limitations: Neck enlargement, duration, growth, pain, hoarseness, dysphagia, dyspnoea, thyroid symptoms, examination, TSH, ultrasound, nodule risk, diagnosis and plan remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
